prompt: Professional minimalist flat design monogram logo combining the letters A and M into a single elegant geometric form. The A and M are intertwined and overlapping, creating one unified symmetrical mark. Primary color is olive green (#556B2F) with subtle gold (#C9A84C) accent lines. Ultra clean lines, no gradients, pure flat solid colors. The monogram is modern, sophisticated, and feminine but strong. Isolated on completely transparent background. Vector-like appearance. High fidelity design. Perfectly symmetrical. Do not add any text, words, or labels. Do not add shadows, 3D effects, or photorealism. Flat solid colors only. Crisp sharp edges.
negative_prompt: realistic photograph, 3D render, photorealistic, blurry, low quality, cartoon style, hand-drawn, painted, watercolor, textured, gradients, shadows, depth effects, realistic shading, noisy, amateur design, cluttered, complex details, text, words, letters spelled out, typography, serif font, decorative elements, floral, nature, leaves, flowers
